name: dt-misc
documentation:
# dt-misc

dt-misc is a python library used to support the set of dt_tools packages:
 - dt-console  [[repo]](https://github.com/JavaWiz1/dt-console)  [[docs]](https://htmlpreview.github.io/?https://github.com/JavaWiz1/dt-console/blob/develop/docs/html/index.html)
 - dt-net  [[repo]](https://github.com/JavaWiz1/dt-net)  [[docs]](https://htmlpreview.github.io/?https://github.com/JavaWiz1/dt-net/blob/develop/docs/html/index.html)
 - dt-cli-tools  [[repo]](https://github.com/JavaWiz1/dt-cli-tools)  [[docs]](https://htmlpreview.github.io/?https://github.com/JavaWiz1/dt-cli-tools/blob/develop/docs/html/index.html)

and others.

It contains helper packages for Geolocation, Weather and Text-to-Speech (TSS).

## Installation

### Download source code from githup via git
```bash
git clone https://github.com/JavaWiz1/dt-misc.git
```
Note, when downloading source, [Poetry](https://python-poetry.org/docs/) was used as the package manager.  Poetry 
handles creating the virtual environment and all dependent packages installs with proper versions.

To setup virtual environment with required production __AND__ dev ([sphinx](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/)) dependencies:
```bash
poetry install
```

with ONLY production packages (no sphinx):
```bash
poetry install --without dev
```

### use the package manager [pip](https://pip.pypa.io/en/stable/) to install dt-misc.

```bash
pip install dt-misc [--user]
```

## Documentation
Package documentation can be found [here](https://htmlpreview.github.io/?https://github.com/JavaWiz1/dt-misc/blob/develop/docs/html/index.html).

modules.name: dt_tools.cli.demos.dt_weather_demo
documentation: This module demonstrates the Weather module functionality.

modules.name: dt_tools.cli.demos.dt_misc_demo
documentation:
This module will execute the dt_misc package demonstrations, which include:

- GeoLocation
- Weather (current, forecast, alerts)
- Sound (TTS - text to speech)

To Run:
    ``poetry run python -m dt_tools.cli.demos.dt_misc_demo``

modules.name: dt_tools.cli.demos.dt_misc_sound_demo
documentation:
This module demonstrates the Sound class functionality.

- Speak with accents.
- Vary speech speed/cadence.
- Speak the contents of a text file.

modules.name: dt_tools.cli.demos.dt_geoloc_demo
documentation: This module demonstrates the Geolocation module functionality.

modules.name: dt_tools.misc.sound
documentation:
Speak a string of text or speak the contents of a text file.

Currently, these routines expect VLC to be installed.

Example::

: from dt_tools.os.sound import Accent, Sound

  obj = Sound()
  obj.speak('This is a test')
  obj.speak('This is a test, with an australian accent.', accent=Accent.Australia)

ToDo:

> Update to be cross platform without relying on VLC

classes.name: dt_tools.misc.sound.Accent
documentation: Accent codes for speaking

classes.name: dt_tools.misc.sound.Sound

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.sound.Sound.speak
documentation:
Speak the text string or contents of the file

NOTE: Speech will block until done if already speaking.

Args:
    in_token (str): File or string of text to be spoken
    speed (float, optional): Speed (cadence) of voice. Higher numbers faster cadence. Defaults to 1.0.
    accent (Accent, optional): Accent of speaker. Defaults to Accent.UnitedStates.
    ignore_in_progress: (bool, optional): Ignore request if speech is already in progress. Defaults to False
    wait: (bool, optional): Wait for speech to finish before returning. Defaults to True.
    delete_mp3 (bool, optional): Remove generate mp3 file. Defaults to True

Returns:
    bool: True if successful else False

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.sound.Sound.is_speaking
documentation:
Is speech in progress...

Returns:
    bool: True if speech is occuring, else False

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.sound.Sound.play
documentation:
Play a sound file.

Args:
    sound_file (str): Filename
    speed (float, optional): Speed (cadence) of voice. Defaults to 1.0.

Returns:
    int: 0 if successful else non-zero

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.sound.Sound._play
documentation: Play the sound file

Class to speak a string of text (or contents of a text file).

This class relies on VLC being installed, it works on both Windows and Linux.

Raises:
    FileNotFoundError: If file is not found.

modules.name: dt_tools.misc.sun
documentation:
Get sunrise and sunset for specific GPS coordinate

Example:

    sun = Sun()
    print('Sunrise: {sun.sunrise}  Sunset: {sun.sunset}')

classes.name: dt_tools.misc.sun.Sun

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.sun.Sun.__init__
documentation:
Sun object located at lat, lon

Args:
    lat (_type_): latitude
    lon (_type_): longitude

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.sun.Sun.time_now_at
documentation:
Current local time at GPS Coordinates

Returns:
    datetime.datetime: current date time in GPS coordinate local time.

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.sun.Sun.get_sunrise_time
documentation:
Get sunrise time at GPS coordinates in UTC format

Args:
    date (datetime.date, optional): Target date, if none, today. Defaults to None.

Raises:
    SunTimeException: When the sun does not rise at this location on the specified date.

Returns:
    _type_: UTC datetime

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.sun.Sun.get_local_sunrise_time
documentation:
Get sunrise time in local timezone format

Args:
    date (datetime.date, optional): Target date, if none, today. Defaults to None.

Raises:
    SunTimeException: When the sun does not rise at this location on the specified date.

Returns:
    _type_: datetime - Local timezone datetime

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.sun.Sun.get_sunset_time
documentation:
Get sunset time at GPS coordinates in UTC format

Args:
    date (datetime.date, optional): Target date, if none, today. Defaults to None.

Raises:
    SunTimeException: When the sun does not set at this location on the specified date.

Returns:
    _type_: UTC datetime

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.sun.Sun.get_local_sunset_time
documentation:
Get sunset time in local timezone format

Args:
    date (datetime.date, optional): Target date, if none, today. Defaults to None.

Raises:
    SunTimeException: When the sun does not set at this location on the specified date.

Returns:
    _type_: datetime - Local timezone datetime

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.sun.Sun._calc_sun_time
documentation:
Calculate sunrise or sunset date.
\:param date: Reference date
\:param isRiseTime: True if you want to calculate sunrise time.
\:param zenith: Sun reference zenith
\:return: UTC sunset or sunrise datetime
\:raises: SunTimeException when there is no sunrise and sunset on given location and date

Approximated calculation of sunrise and sunset datetimes. Adapted from:
https://stackoverflow.com/questions/19615350/calculate-sunrise-and-sunset-times-for-a-given-gps-coordinate-within-postgresql

modules.name: dt_tools.misc.geoloc
documentation:
Module to retrieve location data based on 
- GPS Coordinates
- Address
- Landmark name
- Zip code

NOTE:

Requires a FREE API Key from https://geocode.maps.co

See set_api_tokens.exe (dt-cli-tools) for caching the token.

Retrieve location based on street address

Required:

Retrieve location based on street address

Required:

Optional:

Returns:

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.geoloc.GeoLocation.get_location_via_zip
documentation: Retrieve location based on zip code

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.geoloc.GeoLocation.get_location_via_ip
documentation: Retrieve location info based on IP address

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.geoloc.GeoLocation.GPS_dms_to_dd
documentation:
Return Lat/Lon decimal degrees (dd) from Lat/Long Degree, Minute Seconds (dms) coordinates.

Args:
    lat_dms: (degree, minute, sec)
    lat_ref: N or S
    lon_dmsL (degree, minute, sec)
    lon_ref: E or W

Returns:
    lat_dd: decimal degree - latitude 
    lon_dd: decimal degree - longitude
    (0.0, 0.0) on ERROR

Class to represent GPS Location, with interfaces to populate via 
- GPS Location (latitude, longitude)
- Address (House, Street, City, State, Zip)
- Address (formattet string)
- Landmark (For example- Statue of Liberty or Mount Rushmore)
- Zip

modules.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather
documentation:
weather.py - current, forecasts, alerts

This module leverages 3rd party service (weatherapi.com) to retrieve detailed weather
information based on GeloLocation (latitude, longitude).

Location information can be retrieved based on:
- GeoLocation (lat/lon)
- US address (string or components (street, city, state, zip))
- Internet IP address

variables.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather.weather
documentation: Must create new due to throttle timer

variables.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather.weather
documentation: Must create new due to throttle timer

class_variables.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather.CURRENT_WEATHER_SETTINGS.BASE_URL
documentation: 1 million calls per month

classes.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather.CurrentConditions

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather.CurrentConditions.set_location_via_lat_lon
documentation:
Set weather location based on Geolocation

Args:
    lat (float): Latitude
    lon (float): Longitude

Returns:
    bool: True if location successfully set.

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather.CurrentConditions.set_location_via_census_address
documentation:
Set location based on address: street, city, state or street, zipcd

The GeoLocation will be derived based on the address.  NOTE: only US addresses are allowed.

Args:
    street (str): House number and street name
    city (str, optional): City. Defaults to None.
    state (str, optional): State. Defaults to None.
    zipcd (str, optional): Zip code. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    bool: True if address is resolved and GeoLocation identified, else False

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather.CurrentConditions.set_location_via_address
documentation:
Set location based on address string

GeoLocation will be derived based on the address. 

Args:
    address (str): Address string - i.e. 123 somestree, somecity, somestate, some zip

Returns:
    bool: True if address is resolved and GeoLocation identified, else False

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather.CurrentConditions.set_location_via_ip
documentation:
Set location based on IP address

The IP should be resolvable on the internet (i.e. local addresses won't work)

Args:
    ip (str, optional): IP to resolve, if None, The device external address (i.e. from
        service provider will be used). Defaults to None.

Returns:
    bool: True if IP is resovled to GeoLocation, else False

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather.CurrentConditions.disabled
documentation:
Check if location defined, API and connection is available

Returns:
    bool: False if connection is available, else False

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather.CurrentConditions.to_string
documentation:
String representation of the current weather.

Returns:
    str: _description_

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather.CurrentConditions.refresh

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather.CurrentConditions._refresh_if_stale
documentation: Refresh weather data if stale.  Default is 15 monutes.

Weather condition class

modules.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather_forecast_alert
documentation:
weather_forecast_alert.py

Module which leverages The National Weather Service (NWS) API (api.weather.gov) to retrieve weather forecasts and alerts based on GeoLocation (latitude, longitude).

This is a free API provided by the US government

NOTE:

    - Endpoint only support US locations (including )

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather_forecast_alert.AbstractEndpoint.name
documentation: Friendly name (if exists) or location

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather_forecast_alert.AbstractEndpoint.refresh_if_needed
documentation: Return true if refresh needed and successful else false

classes.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather_forecast_alert.Forecast

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather_forecast_alert.Forecast.forecast_for_future_day
documentation:
Get weather forecast for a future day/night

Args:
    days_in_future (int): Number of days in future (0=Today)
    time_of_day (ForecastType, optional): Forecast.DAY or Forecast.NIGHT. Defaults to ForecastType.DAY.

Returns:
    Union[ForecastDay, None]: Forecast for target day if found, else None

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather_forecast_alert.Forecast.forecast_for_today
documentation:
Get weather forecast for today (or tonight)

Args:
    time_of_day (ForecastType, optional): Forecast.DAY or Forecast.NIGHT. Defaults to ForecastType.DAY.

Returns:
    Union[ForecastDay, None]: Forecast for today/night if found, else None

methods.name: dt_tools.misc.weather.weather_forecast_alert.Forecast.forecast_for_tomorrow
documentation:
Get weather forecast for tomorrow

Args:
    time_of_day (ForecastType, optional): Forecast.DAY or Forecast.NIGHT. Defaults to ForecastType.DAY.

Returns:
    Union[ForecastDay, None]: Forecast for tomorrow (day or night) if found, else None

Class to interface for weather Forecast

Populate ForecastDay class by calling one of: 
- forecast_for_future_day()
- forecast_for_today()
- forecast_for_tomorrow()

Example:

    weather_forecast = Forcast(30.0694,-81.5515) # Fruit Cove, Florida
    today: ForecastDay = weather_forecast.forecast_for_today(ForecastType.DAY)
    print(today.short_forecast)
